privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating three test files in app/src/test/java/com/example/notepad/: NoteValidatorTest.kt, NoteFormatterTest.kt, and NoteTest.kt. Each file must have at least 3 methods annotated with @Test. NoteValidator tests should target methods like isValidTitle, isValidContent, etc. NoteFormatter tests should target formatTitle, formatPreview, etc. Note tests should target wordCount and charCount. The tests must compile (15 points) and pass (25 points). Full points for a file are awarded if it contains >= 3 @Test methods.
